events.event_description: Donald Norland presented credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim on the date of Upper Volta's independence, establishing initial U.S. diplomatic contact but prior to any formal mission being opened.

evidence.quote: Donald Richard Norland, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1960-08-05. Note: Presented credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim on August 4, 1960, to take effect on August 5, 1960.

events.event_description: Robert Borden Reams presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, but was nonresident, being commissioned to Dahomey. This established nonresident ambassadorial relations before the Embassy was formally opened.

evidence.quote: Robert Borden Reams, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1960-10-14. Credentials presented: 1960-11-26. Superseded 1961-07-31. Note: Commissioned to Dahomey. Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on February 6, 1961, after confirmation. During Reams's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Ouagadougou was established on December 31, 1960, with Robert McKinnon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Embassy Ouagadougou was formally established with Robert McKinnon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, elevating the U.S. mission to full embassy status.

evidence.quote: During Reams's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Ouagadougou was established on December 31, 1960, with Robert McKinnon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
